mission.title: werf: Forward values with werf image path to subcharts
mission.description: Forward values with werf image path to subcharts. Requested by 38+ users.

steps.title: Check current werf deployment
steps.description:
Verify your werf version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n werf -l app.kubernetes.io/name=werf
helm list -n werf 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working werf installation.

steps.title: Review werf configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant werf configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n werf -l app.kubernetes.io/name=werf
kubectl get configmap -n werf -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=werf
```
Use custom parameters in dependencies list in parent `Chart.yaml` for forward value with image path to subchart

For example:
```
apiVersion: v2
name: parentChart
version: 1.0.0
dependencies:
- name: subChart
  version: 1.0.0
  repository:

steps.title: Apply the fix for Forward values with werf image path to subcharts
steps.description:
Exposing werf service values (including `$.Values.werf.image`) to the subchart is now possible with:
```yaml
.helm/requirements.yaml
------------------------------------------------------
dependencies:
- name: subchart
  version: 1.0.0
  export-values:
  - parent: werf
    child: werf
```
In the
```yaml
apiVersion: v2
name: parentChart
version: 1.0.0
dependencies:
- name: subChart
  version: 1.0.0
  repository: https://charts.flant.com
  condition: subchart.enabled
  alias: subchart
  werfAllowImages:
  - frontend
  - backend
```

steps.title: Upgrade werf to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade werf:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade werf werf/werf --namespace werf
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n werf
helm list -n werf
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n werf -l app.kubernetes.io/name=werf
kubectl get events -n werf --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Forward values with werf image path to subcharts" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Exposing werf service values (including `$.Values.werf.image`) to the subchart is now possible with:
```yaml
.helm/requirements.yaml
------------------------------------------------------
dependencies:
- name: subchart
  version: 1.0.0
  export-values:
  - parent: werf
    child: werf
```
In the subchart:
```yaml
  image: {{ $.Values.werf.image.imagename }}
```
`export-values` can also be used to
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: v2
name: parentChart
version: 1.0.0
dependencies:
- name: subChart
  version: 1.0.0
  repository: https://charts.flant.com
  condition: subchart.enabled
  alias: subchart
  werfAllowImages:
  - frontend
  - backend

.helm/requirements.yaml
------------------------------------------------------
dependencies:
- name: subchart
  version: 1.0.0
  export-values:
  - parent: werf
    child: werf

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with werf installed or the issue environment reproducible.
